--- Thread (35 messages, 2018-04-13) ---
[2018-04-13 20:08] crash_overlord: fastimus isn't fast enough to stop it
[2018-04-13 20:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): (by b+1, the 1 in this case is tyrano)
[2018-04-13 20:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): in think in this and bso, there are cases where this unit is literally free
[2018-04-13 20:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): where you are wasting the :Red: AND the :Attack:
[2018-04-13 20:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): p2's ..DA/DTT/DTT/RB line for example
[2018-04-13 20:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think this unit coming in in 8 turns is nontrivial
[2018-04-13 20:09] crash_overlord: I'f they're both free the game will end before 7 turns
[2018-04-13 20:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): the games dont end as quickly as you might think
[2018-04-13 20:09] crash_overlord: if only :Attack: is free the Red cost is too much imo
[2018-04-13 20:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): have you seen the base+mobile animus vs. BSO analysis?
[2018-04-13 20:11] masn6811 (Masne98888): it was pretty awesome imo
[2018-04-13 20:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): but you can stretch the game to 17 or so turns, so if this comes down on turn 5, and takes 8 turns to build...
[2018-04-13 20:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): bso got a new line of fire lately
[2018-04-13 20:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): usually the opening is 1. DD/DD 2. DD/DA
[2018-04-13 20:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): and consensus is if 3. DDA, then ..DTT 4. DBT/DTT, and p2 wins
[2018-04-13 20:14] masn6811 (Masne98888): while if 3. DDB, then ..DDT and p2 wins
[2018-04-13 20:14] masn6811 (Masne98888): but the new innovation which is still undecided is "does p2 win with 3. ..DTT against DDB?"
[2018-04-13 20:14] crash_overlord: I guess you might be able to buy it
[2018-04-13 20:14] crash_overlord: because you win as p2 anyways
[2018-04-13 20:14] crash_overlord: and p1 cant go animus
[2018-04-13 20:14] masn6811 (Masne98888): for the longest time, people thought the answer is no
[2018-04-13 20:14] crash_overlord: so p1 cant ever buy it
[2018-04-13 20:15] masn6811 (Masne98888): now, weirdly enough, if the answer is yes, yujuri is wrong, and lucy isn't actually a factor in base+1
[2018-04-13 20:15] masn6811 (Masne98888): while if the answer is no, lucy is a thing
[2018-04-13 20:16] masn6811 (Masne98888): and i think it's deceiving to say "p1 can't go animus", because p2 wins BSO anyways. however, if you made a chart, p1's BA line beat's p2's BC line, while p2's BA line beats p1's BC line (p2 wins both the BA and the BC mirror)
[2018-04-13 20:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): so if anything, i think it's closer to "p1 should go animus"
[2018-04-13 20:17] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Make Arms Race Base.
[2018-04-13 20:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): seems like SSP wants to type something, but can't make up his mind 🤔
[2018-04-13 20:18] masn6811 (Masne98888): i saw a lot of "SSP is typing...", then he stopped, then he started typing again 🤔
[2018-04-13 20:18] masn6811 (Masne98888): it's slightly distracting, even though I'm trying to ignore it :monkaS:
[2018-04-13 20:21] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Could you analyze Hippo (1.2) BSO?
